hooks.name: UI Test Watcher
hooks.description: When a UI file (.astro, .html, popup.html) is edited, analyze the change and suggest or write a corresponding Playwright test. Check if existing tests still cover the change.

action.prompt: A UI file was just edited. Analyze the change and: 1) Write a new Playwright test if a new feature was added. 2) Update existing tests if behaviour changed. 3) Do NOT delete passing tests unless the feature was removed. Place tests in the appropriate tests/ folder. Match existing test patterns.
